calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-02-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Monica Mazzel appearing for trustee. Court is not going to approve this ten year account. Michael Teitler acted as sole trustee even though Judge Arata denited his 1996 request to do so. Commission approved in 1996 was not paid 1/2 income and 1/2 principal. Court does not have the request to resign. Request for appointment of sole trustee is denied. Court will approve appointment of two co-trustees. This is a living trust that does not require court supervision. Request to transfer assets to another trust in Contra Costa is denied. This Court does not have the authority to order what is happening in Contra Costa Court. Fees is submitted.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.
